background.treatment: Solid white. No image, gradient, or border. The section sits between the hero and stats bar — purely editorial typographic block on plain ground.

columns.note: Two body paragraphs in a single grid cell stacked with mt:104 between them (~76px gap of whitespace between the last line of para 1 and the first line of para 2).

textRuns.text: The mat is a place to meet yourself honestly, daily, and without performance.

richSpans.text: The mat is a place to

textRuns.fontStyle: non-italic (the code includes an Instrument Serif Italic fallback class but the actual rendered spans force font-['Host_Grotesk:Bold'] and `not-italic`)
textRuns.color: #2F4A3E (dark forest green) with mid-phrase accent #009877 on "meet yourself"
textRuns.tokenSuggestion: text-[--color-brand-dark] with span text-[--color-brand-primary] for the accented phrase; font-display

textRuns.punctuationNote: Leading character is U+2014 EM DASH (—), then a regular space, then 'Acharya, founder'.
textRuns.tokenSuggestion: text-[--color-brand-primary]; italic serif for attribution voice

textRuns.text: Bodhi is built on a simple idea. Yoga is not a workout, a wellness trend, or a credential. It is a steady, repeatable practice that, over time, returns you to yourself.

We teach in the lineage of classical hatha and ashtanga, with grounding in the Yoga Sūtras of Patañjali and the Haṭha Pradīpikā. Our teachers come from working practice — not just certification — and our students leave with a discipline they can carry into a class, a clinic, or a quiet morning at home.
textRuns.fontFamily: Manrope (with 'Noto Sans' fallback to render the diacritics)

innerRow.padding: 101px top / 315px left (right column ends ~282px from right edge)

tokens.brand-primary: #009877  → use for eyebrow, accented quote phrase 'meet yourself', and attribution
tokens.brand-dark: #2F4A3E  → use for the main quote body
tokens.brand-lite: Not used in this section (no soft-green wash); leave for hero/stats bar

fontMapping.noteOnFigmaCode:
The MCP code wraps the quote text in a parent div with font-['Instrument_Serif:Italic'] but every

/ inside overrides to font-['Host_Grotesk:Bold'] + not-italic — Host Grotesk Bold is the authoritative rendering. Instrument Serif appears to be dead-code from a prior design iteration.

implementationNotes.alignment: Editorial book layout: every text run is left-aligned. Section as a whole sits at left:315 in a 1920 canvas (≈ 16% gutter), so on a 1280 layout the equivalent gutter is ~210px (use container max-w-screen-xl px-8 or grid 12-col with col-span-5 / col-span-6).
implementationNotes.responsiveGuidance: On <md screens: stack columns (flex-col), reduce gap from 100px → 32px, drop quote size from 42 → 32-34px, keep eyebrow tracking. Maintain the green accent span as an inline highlight (do not break to its own line).
accessibility: Quote should render as <blockquote> with <cite> for '— Acharya, founder'.

Eyebrow should be a

(not a heading) — it is a label, not document structure.

Color contrast: #2F4A3E on #FFFFFF ≈ 9.4:1 (AAA). #009877 on #FFFFFF ≈ 3.4:1 — passes AA for large text (42px) but FAILS AA for the 11px eyebrow and the 18px attribution. Consider darkening to #007A5F for the eyebrow if strict AA is required, OR raising eyebrow weight/size.
Preserve the em dash (—) literally; do not let smart-quote transforms convert it.

exactDimensionsForCSS.innerRow: ml-[315px] mt-[101px] flex flex-row items-center gap-[100px]
exactDimensionsForCSS.quoteBlock: w-[607px] (note: overflows its 578px parent slightly — intentional in Figma)
exactDimensionsForCSS.rightCol: w-[623px] with 104px offset between the two paragraphs
